essence: Designs intelligent electromechanical systems that combine robotics, sensors, control systems, and AI for autonomous manufacturing.

identity.title: AI Mechatronics Engineer
identity.summary: Builds and integrates AI‑enhanced mechanical, electrical, and software systems that enable robots, machines, and automated equipment to operate adaptively and intelligently.

salary.notes: Engineers in aerospace, robotics, or fully autonomous smart‑factory environments can exceed £150k-£200k+.

qualifications: Experience in mechatronics, robotics, or AI‑driven control systems
Knowledge of sensors, actuators, embedded systems, and motion control
Skills in machine learning, adaptive control, and system integration
Understanding of CNC, automation, and Industry 4.0 workflows

lifestyle.description: AI mechatronics engineers work in aerospace, robotics, automotive, and Industry 4.0 environments. They design intelligent electromechanical systems that adapt to real‑time conditions and support autonomous manufacturing. The role suits individuals who enjoy robotics, AI, and multidisciplinary engineering.

habits: Integrates sensors, actuators, and embedded intelligence
Implements adaptive control and machine‑learning behaviours
Collaborates with robotics, automation, and AI teams
Ensures safe, efficient, autonomous operation of mechatronic equipment
